name: ppt-orchestrator-html
title: PPT Orchestrator HTML 总控
description: HTML PPT orchestrator skill for AutoBoard/OpenDesign. It preserves source content, performs PPT input intake for editable/image/mixed slides, routes page types, binds ultrawide visual style, and outputs previewable editable HTML PPT decks.

description_i18n.zh-CN: AutoBoard / OpenDesign HTML 型 PPT 总控 Skill：保留正式内容，执行 PPT 输入诊断（可编辑/图片型/混合型）、图片型页面解析、内容账本前置检查、页面类型路由、绑定超宽视觉风格，并输出可预览可编辑 HTML PPT。
description_i18n.en: HTML PPT orchestrator skill for AutoBoard/OpenDesign. It preserves source content, performs PPT input intake for editable/image/mixed slides, routes page types, binds ultrawide visual style, and outputs previewable editable HTML PPT decks.

query.zh-CN: 请使用 PPT Orchestrator Skill，把我上传或粘贴的 PPT / 文档素材生成 HTML 型 PPT。先执行 PPT 输入诊断：区分 editable_slide、image_based_slide、mixed_slide、unknown_slide；图片型 PPT 需要先做 OCR/视觉分区/内容账本/置信度判断，blocked 页面不得直接生成最终 HTML。页面类型从源内容中自动总结，不强行套通用模板；默认绑定 ultrawide_business_growth_ppt_skill；保持 3696×1008 超宽大屏尺寸；正式 PPT 信息不得改写、不得遗漏、不得新增；明显编辑指令、占位符、待修改备注不作为最终页面正文展示；内容装不下时优先拆页，不允许缩小字号硬塞；必须在项目根目录输出可预览的 index.html，并同级写入 index.html.artifact.json（kind=html、entry=index.html、renderer=html、status=complete）；同时附 intake_result.json、content_inventory.json、edit_instruction_inventory.json、page_plan.json 和 quality_report.json。
query.en: Use the PPT Orchestrator Skill to turn my uploaded or pasted PPT/document material into an HTML PPT deck. First run PPT input intake: classify editable_slide, image_based_slide, mixed_slide, and unknown_slide; image-based PPT pages require OCR/visual-region parsing/content inventory/confidence checks, and blocked pages must not be rendered directly as final HTML. Infer page types from the source instead of forcing a generic template; bind ultrawide_business_growth_ppt_skill by default; keep the 3696×1008 ultrawide canvas; preserve all formal PPT information without rewriting, omitting, or inventing content; do not render edit instructions/placeholders as final body text; split pages instead of shrinking text when content overflows; you must write a previewable index.html at the project root and a sibling index.html.artifact.json (kind=html, entry=index.html, renderer=html, status=complete); also output intake_result.json, content_inventory.json, edit_instruction_inventory.json, page_plan.json, and quality_report.json.

exampleOutputs.title: PPT Orchestrator HTML 总控示例

inputs.name: source_content
inputs.label: PPT / 文档素材
inputs.placeholder: 粘贴或概述需要生成 HTML PPT 的正式内容
inputs.default: 使用主输入框文本和已上传文件作为正式内容来源
